{{Infobox group
| name = Tartarus Travelers
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

''See also: [[Tartarus Travelers Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Tartarus]] [[Travelers]] are a specific class of combatants originating from the [[Territory]] of [[Tartarus]]. Unlike natural [[Travelers]], their home territory is considered an artificial and unnatural creation designed for the express purpose of hunting and killing other [[Travelers]]. In military contexts, they are often utilized as soldiers or guards due to their ability to summon objects and entities rapidly and their tendency to follow orders effectively. They are visually distinguished by armor made of gleaming [[steel]], often accented with red and gold markings to aid identification on the battlefield. Their combat style revolves around using small silver keys made of [[Tartarus steel]] to open gates and summon various weapons and creatures. These summons include spinning blades, needle sprays, tornadoes of glass, and metallic beasts such as armored bears. They are also capable of summoning massive, armored giants. While they serve as effective defensive units and can form protective rings around high-ranking individuals, they are not invincible and have been known to fall to powerful opponents like the [[Incarnation]].}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Tartarus]] [[Travelers]] serve as the guards for the [[King]]'s private [[library]] located in [[Cana]]. Clad in gleaming [[steel]], these small squads of three or four members carry silver keys forged from [[Tartarus steel]]. These specialized keys allow the travelers to summon various entities, including metal beasts, spinning blades, glass tornadoes, and needles. During past events, [[Shai]] managed to infiltrate their barracks, and one traveler was noted to have escaped through her [[Territory]]. A member of this group also participated in the recent battle.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tartarus Travelers]] guard the [[King]]'s private [[library]] in [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tartarus Travelers]] wear gleaming [[steel]] and carry keys.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|There is a squad of three or four [[Tartarus Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tartarus Travelers]] use small silver keys made of [[Tartarus steel]] for summoning.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tartarus Travelers]] carry silver keys.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Tartarus]] [[Traveler]] escaped through her [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Shai]] once found her way into the [[Tartarus Travelers]]' barracks.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Tartarus]] [[Traveler]] was involved in the battle.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tartarus Travelers]] can summon needles, spinning blades, metal beasts, and glass tornadoes.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|There are three [[Tartarus Travelers]] present.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"listening to Shai tell a story about how she had managed to find her way into the Tartarus Travelers' barracks."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
